title: Operator SHIFTR generates wrong values under specifc circumstances

features.name: signed right shift with width mismatch operand
features.description: Code should include a signed right shift operation where the operand being shifted has smaller bit width than the shift amount register, causing potential sign extension issues

features.name: arithmetic right shift on negative signed value
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic right shift operation performed on a negative signed value (3'b100 representing -4) to test correct sign propagation during shift
